<!-- satisfies IR-01, IR-02 -->
Thanks for the report. Based on your description, this looks like a bug.

A few things that will help us investigate faster:

- **Steps to reproduce** — a minimal, numbered sequence of steps to trigger the issue
- **Expected behavior** — what you expected to happen
- **Actual behavior** — what actually happened
- **Environment** — OS, runtime version, and any relevant config

If you have a stack trace or error message, please paste it directly in the issue body rather than as a screenshot.

A team member will review this. If you don't hear back within 2 business days, feel free to leave a comment and we'll follow up.
